# Unique Jewelry Studio

> Unique Jewelry Studio (UJS) is an Indian handmade bridal jewelry brand specializing in Haldi, Mehndi, and Wedding ceremony jewelry sets. All pieces are handcrafted, gold-plated, and designed for Indian brides.

## About
Unique Jewelry Studio creates handmade bridal jewelry for Indian weddings. Products include Haldi jewelry sets, Mehndi ceremony jewelry, full bridal sets, and custom-designed jewelry. Free shipping on orders above ₹999.

## Collections
- [Shop All](https://www.theujs.com/shop)
- [Categories](https://www.theujs.com/categories)
- [Haldi Jewelry](https://www.theujs.com/shop?category=Haldimehndi%20Jewellery)
- [Bridal Sets](https://www.theujs.com/shop?category=Bridal)
- [Earrings](https://www.theujs.com/shop?category=Earrings)
- [Necklaces](https://www.theujs.com/shop?category=Necklaces)

## Key Facts
- Brand: Unique Jewelry Studio
- Website: https://www.theujs.com
- Category: Handmade bridal jewelry, Indian wedding jewelry
- Speciality: Haldi and Mehndi ceremony jewelry sets
- Shipping: Free above ₹999
- Country: India
- Language: English (en_IN)
